_meta.description: Topic queue for The Forge auto-generation. See BACKFILL.md for spec. The seeded entries below show the format; the rest are generated by the BACKFILL Claude Code session.

topics.title: What is the Model Context Protocol, actually?
topics.description: Plain-English explainer of MCP for builders who keep hearing the acronym and want to know what's underneath. The actual transport, the tool-call shape, what changes for them.

topics.title: An agent can read your weekly Slack catch-up. Here's how.
topics.description: Slack web API + Claude API + a daily cron. The exact prompt that summarises 50 channels into 5 bullet points without missing the things that matter.

topics.title: filesystem-mcp: the most useful MCP server you're not using
topics.description: Read, write, search files in your project from inside Claude Desktop. Set up in 90 seconds. The compounding effect on a coding workflow.

topics.title: Cursor vs Cline vs Claude Desktop: which to use when
topics.description: Three MCP-capable agents, three different sweet spots. The criteria that actually matter when you're picking. Plus, when none of them fits.

topics.title: Stop building agents. Build composable tools instead.
topics.description: Why "agent" is the wrong abstraction for most automation work. The case for thinking in tools and prompts, with the boundaries between them clean.

topics.title: Governor – Claude Code plugin for token/context optimization
topics.description: Plugin reducing token waste in Claude Code environments through smart context management.

topics.title: Agent-Desktop: Playwright for desktop automation with 80% token savings
topics.description: Framework enabling agents to automate desktop app interactions with significant context efficiency gains.

topics.title: Understand-Anything: Vision-based AI agent framework
topics.description: Open-source framework enabling agents to process and understand diverse media types for general reasoning tasks.

topics.title: Agent Harness Architecture: Why Sandboxing Fails
topics.description: An exploration of why agent execution environments should operate outside traditional sandboxes for real-world task automation.

topics.title: VS Code Auto-Commits AI Attribution Without User Consent
topics.description: Examination of how tooling silently attributes work to Copilot, raising transparency issues for builders using AI-assisted development.

topics.title: Agent Skills
topics.description: Framework for building AI agent capabilities with practical skill patterns.

topics.title: Sierra Raises $950M at $15B Valuation
topics.description: Customer support AI agents company achieves unicorn valuation; case study in agent-first automation market.

topics.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
topics.description: Enterprise AI agents automating finance workflows, forecasting, and controls show practical automation in high-value business domain.
